sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (haystack String, needle String);
SELECT haystack, needle, ngramDistanceCaseInsensitive(haystack, needle) AS similarity FROM test_strings WHERE haystack = ANY (SELECT haystack FROM test_strings WHERE LENGTH(haystack) > 5);
SELECT DISTINCT ngramDistanceCaseInsensitive(haystack, needle) FROM test_strings WHERE needle = ANY (SELECT needle FROM test_strings WHERE haystack IS NOT NULL);
SELECT haystack, COUNT(*) AS count FROM test_strings GROUP BY haystack HAVING ngramDistanceCaseInsensitive(haystack, 'test') > 0.5;
CREATE TABLE test_values (value1 Nullable(Int32), value2 Nullable(String));
SELECT value1, ngramDistanceCaseInsensitive(CAST(value2 AS String), 'one') AS distance FROM test_values WHERE value1 IS NOT NULL AND value2 = ANY (SELECT value2 FROM test_values WHERE value1 = 2);
SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE ngramDistanceCaseInsensitive(haystack, 'ClickHouse') > 0.9 AND needle IS NULL;

SELECT * FROM (SELECT haystack, needle FROM test_strings WHERE ngramDistanceCaseInsensitive(haystack, needle) < 0.5) AS subquery WHERE haystack = ANY (SELECT haystack FROM test_strings WHERE needle IS NOT NULL);
SELECT haystack, ngramDistanceCaseInsensitive(haystack, needle) AS similarity FROM (SELECT haystack, needle FROM test_strings) AS inner_query ORDER BY similarity DESC;
